reviews.review_description: This is really fun! It is definitely one of my favorite things to do. There's just a few down sides😕: you can really only play it once because you can totally beat it and it is very short. Other than that it's an amazing game and you should definitely play! Go for the orange crystal.
This game was fun. I however couldn't get the hand tracking to work so I just used the controllers. I wish we had the ability to go fiether and explore the other portals
The game is excellent and definitely deserves a sequel.

This is game is super fun and creative. If you do play this game then you should all go with the orange crystal.

The only downside is that the game is short.

PLAY THIS GAME!

As a complete beginner I followed this and completed the tasks.  It has given me great confidence in using my Quest 3. Great graphics and interaction and can be done sat down. Really impressed with everything.
Thank you

reviews.review_title: Really cool! But where are the worlds?!
reviews.review_description: This game was really cool, and at the end we can see the other worlds and some of them are the original home environments! We want to explore them!
I enjoyed playing & completing each level. Very disappointed that I was not able to explore the worlds at the end.

Beautifully done demonstrator. Great way to train hand control, also voice control. Very good visuals, certainly for a demo. Game play story was a bit harder to understand; OK as that's not the purpose of the app. 
Great UI examples. We'll use that as inspiration for our own development, thanks Meta.
Loved for instance the one where a component needed to be moved through a labyrinth. 
The voice control was very basic; only fixed commands are understood, no NLU.
The usability for teleportation wasn't super natural. Moving forward is OK, but I don't think I'll be using the gesture for turning.
You should  try if you are a new to the vr
what can i say, first meta game i played and it was grest, is there a part 2??
It looks beautiful
Chama
I thought the game was just starting with all the other worlds. When are getting the add ons, this game was GREAT
They didn't even track my hands I was using my controllers the whole time

This was one of the first things I played. I really liked it. Would love more full, longer games like this developed. At the end were a bunch of circles with apparently different worlds. Would be fun to be able to go into them and  interact in the same way.
Hand tracking barely worked for me. It was an immensely frustrating experience. I am normally very lenient in my reviews.
Perfect for an introduction to VR but I wished there were more once you get to learn the basics.
Good game though

you need to add multiplayer to this so i can walk around flipping people off.

Thanks!
Great interactive game!
I love the interaction and creative abilities in this app, we need more portals to open up soon.

Sort of a sequel to the 'First Contact'-demo made by Oculus in 2017. Love these cute little robots and their world, and a really good showcase of the hand tracking capabilities.

Just wished the experience was longer!
This game teaches VR abilities: hands, voice, controllers. Cool atmosphere!
I have really enjoyed this. Anxious to try the other portals.
I just got my meta 3 and this game has been the best I’ve played
I would like to see this game go further without the demo. When will it release to full game ?
The first ever game I played on vr on my new 3S it’s definitely not disappointed it’s so entertain and for me realy shows too how to use the vr properly
Unbelievable, blow my mind, hope I could keep going, am happy to pay for the full version
I am new to VR and just what I experience in this little demo made me so excited for the future of ￼VR.
Tttpigg
Dumb fing game
The best game ever this brings me tot the 80 star Galactica star wars i cant wait for a full game to come out
This is a fantastic and why we love playing VR. I would love to see it develop further and go exploring to other worlds.
Amazing. This is how a VR AR experience should be
Really cool intro to VR.
The perfect way to get to know the new features.
What is the best game I’ve played in the whole year
Excellent game,hope theres more worlds to come and explore soon.
Awesome demo, hope there’s more soon.

I hope this game makes it past the demo. There's nothing else like it. Playing the game is so immersive and its one of the few fully immersive games that doesn't make me cybersick. I can't say enough good about this game.

reviews.review_title: I really hope you guys finish this game
reviews.review_description: Omg!! I haven’t played the vr over a year but I’m glad I came back and see that my wish was answered!! I can’t wait for more

reviews.review_title: Great start to a new game!
reviews.review_description: Really liked the teaser, ready for more:)
It was so fun I fit every single level

As a newbie it was nice to get some training but it was way too short. It either needs to be longer or tell you that’s it. I finished so fast so I kept going around to see what more there was. Was kinda annoyed.
I cannot figure out how to teleport. Also, my hand controllers won't stay hands free and I actually have to hold the controllers. What am I doing wrong?
I love this game my dad dose to but a wish the game was longer and had more things to do

When will this video game release date ? 
Can someone tell me please  ?. I played the Demo but couldn't find it on my VR

Being the demo was very long and adventurous, and the controls were easy to handle. I’d love to have a full game some day!  Hands down, the best VR tutorial game/app on the market!! 

Please make a full version!
Absolute best game in the world and I don't have any questions or problems with the game love it keep up the good work 👍
I hate the way facebook forces you to have this app in you library by not being able to fully uninstall it….

So the first half of the game for hand tracking works perfectly fine when I got to the next part with like the lasers and the switches the teleport was really really buggy and the snap turning was also very buggy I could not for the life of me get through it

reviews.review_title: Cool concept, but doesnt work yet
reviews.review_description: Point and pinch to teleport is super buggy and doesn't workall the time. My hands are tired from trying to get it to work and I finally gave up. Couldn't get through it at all. I'm using quest 3.
This was really fun.   I would love to see a full game upgrade option.  I know it’s a demo.

It was just as exciting as my first VR experience,  all over again! I’m blown away by the Quest 3 and mixed reality! It’s definitely the future! Meta- bring us more more more!!!!! 

I will be doing a review on the Quest 3 and mixed reality on my channel VRSTAR. 

This experience is definitely worth your time guys 🤩
Loved this game.  The graphics and challenges were tons of fun.
Not possible to finish transport section due to the controls randomly bugging out. They just don‘t show up anymore and i‘m stuck waving my hands around like a lunatic.

I usually don't write reviews for games but this one was much more different than all the other games I played
When I first got the gloves it started giving me half life alyx vibes
I loved the story 
I encountered only one glitch 
I really want more content to be in the game because this is truly the best vr game 
I have a top 5 vr games
This ranks 2nd under bonelabs
And that says something 
I highly recommend you to get this game
Wonderful experience please make full game
Your avatar is just creepy
PLEASE develop more content to this game. Open up more levels

I played from start to finish last night and the only thing I didn’t like was that it had to end!  One of the most fun times I’ve had since getting my Quest 2! Make it a full game! I will pay! Not sure what everyone’s issue was with teleporting - I didn’t have any issues at all.  LOVED IT!!
Add something more and update more but love everything else

Hey Meta!
We really need this for Unreal Engine asap, today the standard set by Apple is no controllers, and I'm pretty sure that you are aware of that, so as a developer for the Oculus I'm asking for some help here. The SDK for unity isn't compatible with our game, we work in UE5.
Thank you!

reviews.review_title: I really hope you can see
reviews.review_description: I hope to update the project on Github so that new users can better learn and develop. Thank you very much，Why not update the code on Github?

It looked cool, but was pretty much unusable. 
The tracking is not working, the hands were as laggy as they get, most of the time completely frozen on screen. I had to keep my real hand near the cameras for them to work sometimes, and they stopped working as soon as they were more than 50 cm away from the headset.
It took me forever to finish the gloves and i stopped there, too buggy to be fun.

I had issues teleporting, and after a while, I was able to figure it out. The instructions are not that good. All you have to do is move the top right button that looks like a joy stick up and point the beam in the direction you want to go then release the button. This will move you to the different sections. The goal is to point the beam in the circle of the GPS sign when you see it. You must try it,  I was able to complete the whole game. I wish this was a series.

It’s just that when you build the hands, i don’t know what to do then.
ASD is ruining my day; also when is Roblox on meta quest?
(Not part of review)
After a restart of the Headset the App worked fine (before I had some issues with the teleportation). Now it’s a great way to start with the Quest 3
Too short but excellent game and would love too see a sequel
I have played this a few times and can make the gloves and move a few things around but can’t do anything else guess I need to try to turn on the hand movement instead of the controllers…
I’ve tried to play this game but it crashes repeatedly . I get  what seems to be a white screen behind and I front of me .
I haven’t played it but it made me straight
I was only going to play this game for 5 minutes but then I completed it in 30 minutes.  This game is short but so good it is Roland McDonald approved.

For the quest 3 people who cannot teleport, the pinch tutorial seems misleading.
It works for me if you turn your hand so your palm faces your face and then you close your fist keeping only your index and thumb finger open.
Otherwise this was a cool experience but nothing mindblowing, I sure hope this is not all there is to VR. I'm also salty I didn't get anything for collecting all the coins 😅
I'm finding teleporting impossible in the new part of this came as it won't do that imputs  I'm giving it.

reviews.review_title: A great introduction to hand tracking
reviews.review_description: This game is realy fun to play and has great graphics.

Just want to say this is a good start for anyone new to VR and wants to experiment a bit. Make sure you give microphone permissions otherwise one game will not work at all. got 24 out of 25 tokens, but couldn’t find the last one in the main lab area… Was blown away by the fact you could use your hands and ultimately sold me on VR.
It crashed
I really like this game but its so Short  need to be more games with Hand Tracking
